reports.details:
Site Enhancement - Need to remove references to old MFL links at the top of the webpage.  We're handling this via modules.  Maybe in due time I can create hot links directly but for now we'll want to keep only the MVP.

Additionally we're going to need to have a toggle for the website to turn off all the enhancements in the event of a catastrophic big we want the ability to at the very least allow basic MFL Functionality
